achtar10.error: CoordinateError: Cannot build dihedrals through a near-linear chain with a branching terminus: the linear-chain extension supports at most one near-linear neighbour per end (center=[1, 6], linear_l=[5, 13], linear_r=[]). This typically arises in fully linear-rich systems such as long poly(phenylene-ethynylene) chains.

This typically arises in fully linear-rich systems such as long poly(phenylene-ethynylene) chains.
